title: corydalis speciosa var. speciosa
intro: Corydalis speciosa var. speciosa, also known as yellow corydalis or yellow fumewort, is a perennial flowering plant native to Asia and Eastern North America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and fern-like foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic activities. The health benefits of Corydalis speciosa var. speciosa include relieving pain and inflammation, as well as reducing anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and capsules that can be used to treat various health conditions.
